title: Quest 1.7 Litre Electric Kettle/Grey/Cord Storage/Water Level Indicator/BPA Free/Automatic Cut-Off/Student Essentials for University
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 1.7L KETTLE - With a 1.7 litre capacity cordless jug, this kettle is big enough to make up to six cups at once, making it a great choice for family homes or offices – perfect for everyday use. For your peace of mind, this kettle is BPA free.
CORD STORAGE – The kettle base includes handy cord storage to keep your worktops tidy and fuss-free. Combining modern design with practical performance, it makes a stylish addition to any kitchen.

SPOUT FILTER – The spout has a removeable and washable filter which makes the kettle easy to clean and maintain, keeping it working to its highest performance. It has a hinged lid for easy filling, a convenient illuminated power indicator, and automatic cut off for safety.
WATER LEVEL INDICATOR – With a transparent fill window, you can easily see and measure how much water you are putting in the kettle while filling it to avoid waste.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page 1.7 Litre Capacity Each of these kettles holds up to 1.7 litres of water, allowing you to boil up to 6 cups at once. Indicator Light The kettle is easily activated via the switch under the handle, which lights up while turned on. Easy Filling The kettle features a hinged lid, and is detachable from its base, both of which make filling easy. Versatile Design The sleek design and variety of colours make these kettles adaptable for use in any kitchen. Next page 1 1.7 Litre Capacity 2 Indicator Light 3 Easy Filling 4 Versatile Design
